seoTitle: Create Global Headers and Footers in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Build reusable global headers and footers in GoHighLevel to keep branding, navigation, and contact info consistent across pages.
intro: Manually updating the header or footer on every page of your website gets tedious fast, but GoHighLevel's global headers and footers let you edit them once and apply the change everywhere. This tutorial covers creating reusable sections, applying them across pages, and keeping your site's navigation and branding consistent.

steps.heading: Create a global header
steps.body: Build a reusable header section that includes your navigation, logo, and branding elements.

steps.heading: Create a global footer
steps.body: Set up a reusable footer with contact information, links, and any other consistent elements you want across your site.

steps.heading: Apply global sections to pages
steps.body: Roll out your global header and footer across the relevant pages of your funnels or website.

steps.heading: Edit and manage global elements
steps.body: Make future updates from a single location, and the changes will apply automatically wherever the global section is used.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for design
steps.body: Design headers and footers that support strong navigation, SEO, and conversions across your site.

faq.question: What's the benefit of using global headers and footers?
faq.answer: They let you maintain consistent branding and navigation across all pages while editing them from a single location instead of page by page.

faq.question: Can I apply the same header to multiple funnels?
faq.answer: Yes, applying reusable global sections across multiple pages is a core part of the tutorial.

faq.question: If I edit the global footer later, do all pages update automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, that's the point of a global section — editing it in one place updates everywhere it's applied.

faq.question: Does this help with SEO?
faq.answer: The tutorial notes that well-designed headers and footers can improve website navigation, SEO, and conversions.

faq.question: Who is this tutorial for?
faq.answer: Agencies, marketers, web designers, business owners, freelancers, and GoHighLevel beginners.
